The lift at Chorlton tram stop is currently out of service. For customers travelling towards Manchester, step-free access is via a platform entrance/exit to the Morrison's car park and the ramp at the pedestrian car park entrance/exit on the corner of Wilbraham Road / Albany Road. For customers travelling away from Manchester, step-free access is via a track crossing to the Manchester bound platform and exiting via the Morrison's car park entrance/exit as described above. We are sorry for any inconvenience caused
